text.title: Modern BA Framework Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-modern-ba-framework.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: framework not in enum; scores, rationale, decided_by, decided_on all missing.

forbidden.pattern: Framework is reselected every 3 months chasing industry trends.
Framework recommendation matches vendor's preferred toolchain regardless of context.
